display.purpose: Hero h1 only. One per page.

body-lg.purpose: Hero subhead and lead paragraphs above the fold.

label.purpose: Eyebrow pills, classifier pills, statistic captions. UPPERCASE, wide tracking.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: The single elevation level. Used only on Page White cards floating over Page Off-White sections.

motion.name: color-shift
motion.purpose: Default transition for color/border changes on links, buttons, and pills. The only motion on the site.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solder Gold fill, Drafting Navy text. The single brand voice. One per major CTA.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #d4a843; color: #1a2332; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 1rem 2rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.25rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #e0be6a; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d4a843; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent fill, 2px Solder Gold/60 border, Solder Gold text. Secondary CTA paired with Primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #d4a843; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 1rem 2rem; border: 2px solid rgba(212, 168, 67, 0.6); border-radius: 0.25rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(212, 168, 67, 0.1); }

components.name: Eyebrow Pill
components.description: Sits above a headline as a category tag. Solder Gold/15 fill, Solder Gold text, uppercase, wide tracking.
components.css: .ds-pill-eyebrow { display: inline-block; background: rgba(212, 168, 67, 0.15); color: #d4a843; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Track Classifier Pill (Primary)
components.description: Solid Solder Gold fill, Drafting Navy text. Marks the primary buyer track on the services preview.
components.css: .ds-pill-primary { display: inline-block; background: #d4a843; color: #1a2332; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Track Classifier Pill (Secondary)
components.description: Solid Drafting Navy fill, Page White text. Marks the secondary buyer track on the services preview.
components.css: .ds-pill-secondary { display: inline-block; background: #1a2332; color: #ffffff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Page White background, single Card Lift shadow, no border, generous internal padding.
components.html:
Rapid Modernization

Classic ASP, .NET Framework, VB6, or Oracle PL/SQL, rebuilt as modern .NET 8 Blazor with CI/CD, tests, and docs. Fixed price.

Learn more →
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; padding: 2rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 1px 2px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; max-width: 22rem; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1a2332; margin: 0 0 0.75rem; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.625; color: #4b5563; margin: 0 0 1rem; } .ds-card-link { color: #d4a843; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-card-link:hover { color: #b8912e; }

components.name: Email Input
components.description: Page White fill, 1px Ink-300 border, Solder Gold focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input-text { background: #ffffff; color: #374151; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 0.5rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); width: 18rem; } .ds-input-text:focus-visible { border-color: transparent; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #d4a843; }

components.name: Sticky Site Header
components.description: Drafting Navy bar with WT/S split-color wordmark, white nav links, gold-on-hover, gold primary CTA.
components.html:
William Tucker Solutions
ServicesAboutCase StudiesBook a Call
components.css: .ds-nav { background: #1a2332; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; gap: 2rem; } .ds-logo { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.625rem; color: #ffffff; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; } .ds-logo-accent { color: #d4a843; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1.5rem; } .ds-nav-links a { color: #ffffff; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.9375rem; text-decoration: none; transition: color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-links a:hover { color: #d4a843; } .ds-nav-cta { background: #d4a843; color: #1a2332 !important; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 0.25rem; transition: background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: #e0be6a; }

components.name: Stat Strip
components.description: Three-up bordered statistics block. The signature social-proof component. No shadow, internal dividers, every number references a real artifact.
components.html:
12+

Years of production engineering experience

705K+

Lines of legacy code rebuilt with AI-augmented delivery

0

Platform affiliations or vendor commissions
components.css: .ds-stat-strip { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 0.75rem; overflow: hidden; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; max-width: 60rem; } .ds-stat-cell { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center; padding: 2.5rem 2rem; } .ds-stat-cell + .ds-stat-cell { border-left: 1px solid #e5e7eb; } .ds-stat-number { font-size: 2.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1a2332; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-stat-caption { font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; color: #4b5563; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: The visual system reads as a technical document, not a marketing page. Drafting Navy and Solder Gold reference engineering conventions (blueprint ink, soldered brass) rather than financial-services convention (corporate navy, luxury gold). Inter at sharp weights, generous line height, and a single-shadow elevation vocabulary keep every page feeling closer to a printed spec sheet than a product landing page. The site sells competence as proof. The visual system has to read the same way: every element either carries information or steps aside.
keyCharacteristics: Two-color system. Drafting Navy carries surface, Solder Gold carries voice.
One typeface (Inter), four weights, eight roles. No display face, no script, no mono.
Flat-by-default. One shadow value, used structurally on cards over off-white sections.
Eyebrow pills as taxonomy. Every pill names what comes next.
Numbers as proof, not as ornament. Stat strips reference verifiable artifacts.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Solder Gold appears on at most 10% of any screen surface. Reserve it for the call-to-action, eyebrow pills, single-word emphasis in headlines, and link affordances.

rules.name: The Two-Surface Rule
rules.body: Sections alternate between Page White and Page Off-White, or between Page White and Drafting Navy. Never three surface tones in a row without a structural reason.

rules.name: The No-Tinted-Card Rule
rules.body: Cards are always Page White. Cards on Page Off-White sections gain elevation by shadow, never by tint.

rules.name: The Single-Voice Rule
rules.body: No second typeface for accents. Inter does every job. Hierarchy is achieved by weight (400 to 700) and scale (1rem to ~3.75rem), never by family contrast.

rules.name: The Reading-Width Rule
rules.body: Any block of body copy that wraps more than two lines is constrained to 65 to 75 characters per line.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Every surface is flat at rest. The single Card Lift shadow exists to separate cards from their off-white parent section, not to convey mood.

rules.name: The No-Glow Rule
rules.body: Glowing borders, soft focus halos, ambient drop shadows under accent elements: all forbidden.

dos: Do use Solder Gold on at most 10% of any screen surface, reserved for CTAs, eyebrow pills, single-word emphasis, and link affordances.
Do alternate Page White and Page Off-White (or Page White and Drafting Navy) for section rhythm.
Do lead every major section with a labelled eyebrow pill. Pills name categories.
Do keep body copy at 65 to 75 characters per line.
Do hold the type system to Inter, four weights, eight roles. Hierarchy through weight and scale.
Do ground every statistic in a verifiable artifact. Prefer specific numbers like 705,714 lines to round ones like 750k+.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion on every transition.
donts: Don't introduce gradient text, gradient buttons, or gradient hero backgrounds.
Don't introduce a second typeface for personality (no serif display, no script, no mono accent).
Don't add ambient drop-shadow, glassmorphism, glow halos, or backdrop-blur effects.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent on cards, alerts, or callouts.
Don't use a brain icon, abstract circuit illustration, generic AI stock photography, or any 'we harness the power of AI' framing.
Don't use a hand-drawn arrow, oversized founder portrait, or neon-accent CTA.
Don't use abstract enterprise nouns like synergies, transformation journey, or value unlock.
Don't use round-number marketing metrics without a referent (10x, 400% improvement, 100s of clients).
Don't style cards with internal tints, nested cards, or borders combined with shadow.
Don't introduce a second elevation level. There is one shadow on this site.
